skills.description: Analyze chemical structures from compound names and retrieve SMILES, molecular formula, molecular weight, and LogP.
skills.toolDescription: Analyze chemical structure from a compound name.
skills.skillInstructions: Use call_scp_tool with tool_name ChemicalStructureAnalyzer and arguments containing compound_name. Parse the returned JSON for smiles, molecular_formula, molecular_weight, and logP.

skills.description: Run a combined protein sequence analysis with InterProScan and BLAST through BioInfo-Tools.
skills.toolDescription: Comprehensive protein analysis combining InterProScan and BLAST.
skills.skillInstructions: Use call_scp_tool with tool_name analyze_protein and arguments containing sequence. Optional fields include sequence_id, databases, evalue, and max_hits. Summarize domains, GO terms, BLAST hits, and failures clearly.

skills.description: Analyze DNA/RNA sequence properties, reverse complements, and primer temperatures.
skills.skillInstructions: Use call_scp_tool with tool_name GetReverseComplement for reverse-complement requests. For other DNA/RNA calculations, ask the user to choose a matching SCP tool if the selected tool is insufficient.

skills.description: Search biomedical web sources using the Origene Search SCP server.
skills.toolDescription: Search web sources for biomedical information.
skills.skillInstructions: Use call_scp_tool with tool_name tavily_search and arguments containing query. Summarize results with source-aware caveats.

skills.description: Execute a research task using InternAgent FlowSearch.
skills.toolDescription: Execute a research task using FlowSearch API.

argumentHint.prompt: Summarize recent progress in protein language models.

skills.skillInstructions: Use call_scp_tool with tool_name FlowSearch and arguments containing prompt. type defaults to normal_question and file_list can be null unless files are explicitly supplied.
